# my-projects
Update:
1. Today (Oct 21, 2024) I built a project with the aim of utilizing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to improve large language models (LLM) by utilizing external data (PDF). The name of this project is rag-app-using-ollama-and-langchain. The first step I did was install Ollama on the website: https://ollama.com/. Then I pulled the bangundwir/bahasa-4b-chat model (because the source document and input language for my ask use Indonesian) which can be obtained at: https://ollama.com/bangundwir/bahasa-4b-chat. Alternatively, you can use llama3. Next, I registered with Hugging Face to get the Hugging Face Token and I downloaded all the libraries needed. The next step I did the coding and ran the results.
